# Outlaw Feed — Texas-Made Dog Food

> Outlaw Feed is a Bell County, Texas dog food company founded by Travis Farr. We manufacture high-protein, no-filler dog food for working dogs, hunting dogs, and active companions. No corn, wheat, or soy — ever.

## Company Information

- **Business Name:** Travis Farr's Outlaw Feed Co.
- **Location:** Bell County, Texas
- **Phone:** (254) 939-3957
- **Email:** fencesbyfarr@yahoo.com
- **Website:** https://outlawfeed.com

## Products

### Gold Formula
High-performance adult dog food. 26% protein, 18% fat, 3640 kcal/kg. Primary ingredients: Chicken Rice, Brown Rice, Grain Sorghum. For working and hunting dogs.

### Blue Formula
Adult maintenance dog food. 21% protein, 15% fat, 3,170 kcal/kg. Primary ingredients: Chicken Meal, Grain Sorghum, Brown Rice. For everyday adult nutrition.

## Key Pages

- https://outlawfeed.com — Homepage with product overview and brand story
- https://outlawfeed.com/products/gold-formula — Gold Formula product page with full ingredients and guaranteed analysis
- https://outlawfeed.com/products/blue-formula — Blue Formula product page with full ingredients and guaranteed analysis
- https://outlawfeed.com/why-outlaw — Why choose Outlaw Feed over commercial dog food
- https://outlawfeed.com/why-outlaw/ingredients — Detailed ingredient breakdown and sourcing
- https://outlawfeed.com/why-outlaw/our-story — Travis Farr's founding story
- https://outlawfeed.com/where-to-buy — Store locator for Central Texas retailers
- https://outlawfeed.com/feeding-guide — Feeding recommendations by dog weight and formula
- https://outlawfeed.com/contact — Phone, email, and business hours

## Brand Positioning

- Zero fillers: No corn, wheat, or soy in any formula
- Texas-made: Manufactured in Bell County, TX
- Real meat first: Chicken-based protein as primary ingredient
- Working dog focus: Formulated for hunting, ranch, and active dogs
- All life stages support: Products for high-performance and maintenance needs

## Contact

For product questions, retailer inquiries, or Bell County delivery:

- Email: fencesbyfarr@yahoo.com
